title: Craftable Bedrock
description: Makes bedrock craftable, for permanent builds. Be careful where you place it!
body:
## Craftable Bedrock Datapack

Tired of bedrock being an unmovable, uncraftable barrier in your Minecraft world? This datapack changes everything! With this datapack, you can now **craft bedrock** using a simple yet substantial recipe: **9 blocks of obsidian**.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f8a3c93e-fd42-4cbe-b9d6-7e352dfe4e00.png)

Imagine the possibilities! Build truly indestructible bases, create unbreachable vaults, or design challenges with ultimate barriers. No longer confined by the limitations of vanilla gameplay, your creativity can now reach new, unbreakable heights.

**Download the "Unbreakable Creations" datapack today and start building the ultimate, unbreakable structures in your Minecraft world!**

**Note: Minecraft might say that the datapack is incompartable with the minecraft version. However this is not true. It can be used safely in minecraft 1.13.x to 1.21.x without any problems**
